html:
The Axe is a Tool that can be used to chop down Trees. It can be crafted at the beginning of the game with 1 Twig and 1 Flint. An Axe can also be used as a weapon, dealing 27.2 damage on each hit. With either usage, an Axe has enough durability for 100 swings. When used to chop down Trees, Axe requires 5 chops for small, 10 for medium, and 15 for large Trees. Dead or burnt Trees require only one swing. Currently, the amount of chopping required is independent of the type of the Tree.


The Gorge

Only during the Event: The Gorge
In The Gorge event for Don't Starve Together, an Axe can be found between two Fire Pits near the Mossy Gateway, next to two Logs. More Axes can be purchased from the Swamp Pig Elder for five Logs. Axes in The Gorge have infinite durability and have a Victorian-inspired appearance. This new appearance is available as a Skin.

Comparison

  • Consuming dishes with reduces the required number of chops by half. This effect does not apply to the Obsidian Axe.
  • The efficiency of the Shadow Maul varies depending on its level, so it is not listed in the table.
  • Some Characters has different effiency. For example, Wes works 0.5x efficiency and strong Wolfgang works 2x efficiency.

Usage

To chop down a Tree with the Axe, players can right-click it from the inventory to equip it and left-click the Tree (Or press "X" in the console edition). Once the player begins to chop the Tree, holding down the LMB or Spacebar will have the player character keep chopping until the Tree falls. Alternatively, one can chop faster by repeatedly clicking LMB with specific timing.

In addition to chopping down trees, Axes are used in the following crafting recipes.

Outside of chopping trees, the Axe can be a cheap tool to be used as a weapon for early game survival.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Fanciful Axe skin was introduced during the official The Gorge event in 2018.
  • The Woven - Elegant Nordic Axe skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
  • The Woven - Distinguished Hunters Axe skin is available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Loyal Heartchet skin was for opening the game during update of Year of the Clockwork Knight event.
Woven - Classy
Pantomime Collection
Pantomimed Axe
Convey an incredibly convincing impression of an axe.
Woven - Distinguished
Hunters Axe
An axe for the self-reliant adventurer.
See ingame

Fanciful Axe
An elegantly engraved silver axe.
See ingame

Year of the Carrat Collection
Nordic Axe
A rustic, sturdy axe.
See ingame
Loyal
Heart Collection
Heartchet
Swing with love.
Woven - Distinguished
Rose Collection
Blooming Axe
Chopping trees has never been this romantic.

Trivia

  • The Axe used to have a value of 1-10 Science Points depending on its durability when used on a Science Machine, while the Luxury Axe gave 1-35.
  • Lucy the Axe, a character-specific item, is given to Woodie upon spawn. It acts as an infinite durability Axe that chops Trees much faster but does less damage. 
  • Axes deal the same amount of damage as Boomerangs.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rìu là một Công cụ có thể được sử dụng để chặt cây. Nó có thể được chế tạo vào đầu trò chơi với 1 Cành Cây và 1 Đá Lửa. Rìu cũng có thể được sử dụng làm vũ khí, gây 27,2 sát thương cho mỗi đòn đánh. Với cả hai cách sử dụng, Rìu có đủ độ bền cho 100 lần vung. Khi dùng để chặt Cây, Rìu cần 5 nhát đối với Cây nhỏ, 10 nhát đối với Cây trung bình và 15 nhát đối với Cây lớn. Cây chết hoặc cháy chỉ cần một lần vung. Hiện tại, số lượng chặt cần thiết không phụ thuộc vào loại Cây.

It can be crafted at the beginning of the game with 1 [[Twig]] and 1 [[Flint]]. An Axe can also be used as a weapon, dealing 27.2 {{Hp}} damage on each hit. With either usage, an Axe has enough durability for 100 swings. When used to chop down Trees, Axe requires 5 chops for small, 10 for medium, and 15 for large Trees. Dead or burnt Trees require only one swing. Currently, the amount of chopping required is independent of the type of the Tree. __NOTOC__ {{Clear}} == {{Pic|32|Silver Bowl}} The Gorge == {{Item Infobox |equipslot = hands |image = Axe Gorge.png |description = Chop down trees! |durability = Infinity '''([[Tools#Chopping_Tools|Chopping]])''' |soldBy = {{Pic32|Log/DST}}×5 ({{Pic32|Swamp Pig Elder}}) |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "axe" }} {{Event|The Gorge}} In [[The Gorge]] [[:Category:Events|event]] for ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', an Axe can be found between two [[Fire Pit]]s near the [[Ancient Gateway#The Gorge|Mossy Gateway]], next to two Logs. More Axes can be purchased from the [[Swamp Pig Elder]] for five Logs. Axes in The Gorge have infinite durability and have a Victorian-inspired appearance. This new appearance is available as a [[Belongings|Skin]]. {{clear}} == {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Comparison == {{#lsth:Axe|Comparison}} =={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage== To chop down a Tree with the Axe, players can right-click it from the inventory to equip it and left-click the Tree (Or press "X" in the console edition). Once the player begins to chop the Tree, holding down the LMB or Spacebar will have the player character keep chopping until the Tree falls. Alternatively, one can chop faster by repeatedly clicking LMB with specific timing. In addition to chopping down trees, Axes are used in the following crafting recipes. Outside of chopping trees, the Axe can be a cheap tool to be used as a weapon for early game survival. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Tools Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Fanciful Axe''' skin was introduced during the official [[The Gorge]] event in 2018. * The '''Woven - Elegant Nordic Axe''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Carrat]] event in 2020. * The '''Woven - Distinguished Hunters Axe''' skin is available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points. * The '''Loyal Heartchet''' skin was for opening the game during update of [[Year of the Clockwork Knight]] event.
